mapper.sql: id, post_id, parent_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, commenter_id, content, is_deleted, audit_status, like_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_comment (post_id, parent_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, commenter_id, content, is_deleted, audit_status, like_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{commenterId}, #{content}, #{isDeleted}, #{auditStatus}, #{likeCount}, #{replyCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_comment SET post_id = #{postId}, parent_comment_id = #{parentCommentId}, reply_to_user_id = #{replyToUserId}, commenter_id = #{commenterId}, content = #{content}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, like_count = #{likeCount}, reply_count = #{replyCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_comment WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM forum_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_comment_id = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM forum_comment WHERE parent_comment_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT FROM forum_comment WHERE commenter_id = #{commenterId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0
